name: Sample Homebrew Script
author: BotC Grimoire
bootlegger: Demonstrates the script library: official characters, a homebrew character, and an active jinx (Alchemist / Wraith).

name: Custom Seer
ability: Each night, you learn a number of evil players equal to the number of times you have used this ability.
otherNightReminder: Show the Custom Seer the number of evil players equal to their use count.
